query: Find credible third-party pages summarizing Guidehouse as a federal contractor/consulting firm (e.g., Washington Technology Top 100, Bloomberg Government BGOV200, KLAS). Return the exact URLs and 1-sentence description from each.
answer:
**Washington Technology Top 100 (2025):**  
- https://www.washingtontechnology.com/rankings/top-100/2025/ - Guidehouse LLP ranks #35 on the 2025 Washington Technology Top 100 with $1,139,924,000 in government contract revenue.[5]  
- https://www.washingtontechnology.com/rankings/company/81/top-100/2025/ - Guidehouse LLP ranks #35 on the 2025 Top 100 with $1,139,924,000 total revenue, including $120,516,000 defense and $1,019,408,000 civilian revenue, serving major customers like DHS, FBI, Navy, and HHS.[3]  
- https://asmartplace.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/01/2025-Washington-Technology-Top-100.pdf - Guidehouse LLP ranks #35 on the 2025 Washington Technology Top 100 Government Contractors list with $1,139,924,000 in prime contract obligations.[2]  

**Washington Technology Top 100 (2022):**  
- https://www.prnewswire.com/news-releases/guidehouse-ranks-28-on-2022-washington-technology-top-100-301592697.html - Guidehouse ranks #28 on the 2022 Washington Technology Top 100 list of largest government contractors based on prime contract obligations in IT, systems integration, and professional services.[1]  

No credible third-party pages from Bloomberg Government BGOV200 or KLAS summarizing Guidehouse were found in the results.
